uplink.description: 15-byte data frame: warm indoor reading (positive temperature)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (the ORACLE) on this input and normalizing per our mapping (Voltage mV -> battery V; TVOC -> extra; Status -> extra).

uplink.description: 15-byte data frame: cold reading exercising signed two's-complement temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame with negative temperature (raw 64986 -> -5.50 C); expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js (the ORACLE) and normalized per our mapping.

uplink.description: 10-byte config frame carries no measurements; rejected as an error
uplink._note: The upstream config branch (length 10) decodes only device metadata, not measurements; our codec rejects any non-15-byte frame with an explicit error rather than returning undefined.
